meta.title: Viv Kane Conversation
meta.description: Viv Kane approaches with an offer wrapped in observation. Industry gravity.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: There you are. I was hoping you'd be less raw by now, but raw can be positioned.

choices.text: Then position this: I can move a room faster than your roster can brief one.
If you came to buy a version of me, you're early.
What do you actually do besides appear near fragile people with budgets?

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: Oh, that's good. That's a pull quote. I can already see the deck.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: Play tonight like you mean it, and we'll talk after. Not the green room chat. The real one. With numbers.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: Early? Darling, you look like the closing sale. But that's fine. Clearance has its own energy.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: She's already looking past you. The drink she ordered stays on the bar, unclaimed.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: Fair enough. I respect a boundary that sounds like a lyric. But the window doesn't stay open because you're interesting. It stays open because I'm patient.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: You know where to find me. Everyone does. That's the point.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: I appear near fragile people with talent and I make sure the budget follows. There's a difference, but you'd need to survive a meeting to learn it.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: Look — I'm not the enemy. I'm the translation layer. You make the thing. I make the thing legible to people with chequebooks. That's not corruption. That's plumbing.

nodes.speaker: viv_kane
nodes.text: Smart. A drink is just a drink until it becomes a story about how we met. And I tell very good stories.

nodes.speaker: system
nodes.text: The glass is cold. The conversation is warm. You can already feel the shape of a deal forming, the way weather forms — not suddenly, but unmistakably.
